items.title: Hi,

items.text:
METHOD OF MADNESS - CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for UNION ACTORS to be cast in our project which will be filming in MAY 20, 21, and 22.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: *when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?*

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go

method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

There will be a breakdown on a file attached as well but as for the character breakdowns:

NAOMI (woman, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Naomi is a woman in her 30s who dreams of having a family. However, madly in love with her husband, she allows herself to prioritize his dreams, sticking by him as he tries to make it as an actor. Her excitement for him however, dies when he begins bringing his role home. Her love turns to fear, as the man she cares for so dearly becomes unrecognizable. The pain and heartbreak of slowly losing him to madness eating at her.

JEREMY (man, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Jeremy is a man in his 30s determined to build a life for his family. Desperate to make it as an actor, and truly believing he will, he holds back on beginning his family. A sense of responsibility to impress, both as a husband and onset, pushes him to his limits. As he dedicates himself to his role, his love for his family and his craft morphs into obsession. The concept of a perfect performance consumes him until the madness of his character begins creeping into his life.

BAR TENDER (woman, 20-30, any ethnicity)

Tired and ready to go home, the bartender at a rundown bar is confused when a woman comes in asking to watch the Oscars. However, curiosity gets the best of her as she accepts the request. Her attention suddenly pulled to the stars on screen.

NEWS ANCHOR (Any, 30-40, any ethnicity)

The News anchor is a professional, who is highly skilled as a journalist. With a secondary passion for film and television, they are excited to report on the nominees for the academy awards. However, of all the performances they were especially moved by the performance of one particular actor, Jeremy Leonard.

Please send your information to our email: [methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com](mailto:methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com) and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please provide your introduction (who you are, and what role you are interested in), headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email and you will shortly get a response for your self tapes to be sent in. Keep in mind that ALL self tapes are DUE by April 08. The callbacks will be on April 15th and April 16th. The filming dates are all day May 20, 21, and 22. Please note that this set will be unpaid however, crafty will be on set. 

We hope to hear from you :)

items.summary:
METHOD OF MADNESS - CASTING CALL
My name is Sanvi Bhardwaj and I am the producer of the student led short film called Method of Madness. I am hosting an open casting call that is looking for UNION ACTORS to be cast in our project which will be filming in MAY 20, 21, and 22.

Method of Madness is written to explore the pressure within the acting world to perform masculinity in extreme ways. The story critiques the idea that vulnerability in men must be expressed through aggression or intensity rather than emotional honesty. Through Jeremy’s descent into method acting, the film asks an important question: *when does dedication to art become destructive to the people around us?*

SYNOPSIS: Jeremy Leonard and his wife Naomi are ecstatic when he books his breakout role in a feature playing a deranged serial killer. The two hoping the film will bring them closer to their dream of a family. However, Jeremy immerses himself in the role, and dedication turns into obsession as he chooses to go

method. As his erratic and violent behaviour towards his wife increases so does the critical acclaim of his film. Leaving Naomi stuck between two versions of her husband. The instant global sensation, the killer that made him famous.

There will be a breakdown on a file attached as well but as for the character breakdowns:

NAOMI (woman, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Naomi is a woman in her 30s who dreams of having a family. However, madly in love with her husband, she allows herself to prioritize his dreams, sticking by him as he tries to make it as an actor. Her excitement for him however, dies when he begins bringing his role home. Her love turns to fear, as the man she cares for so dearly becomes unrecognizable. The pain and heartbreak of slowly losing him to madness eating at her.

JEREMY (man, 25-35, any ethnicity)

Jeremy is a man in his 30s determined to build a life for his family. Desperate to make it as an actor, and truly believing he will, he holds back on beginning his family. A sense of responsibility to impress, both as a husband and onset, pushes him to his limits. As he dedicates himself to his role, his love for his family and his craft morphs into obsession. The concept of a perfect performance consumes him until the madness of his character begins creeping into his life.

BAR TENDER (woman, 20-30, any ethnicity)

Tired and ready to go home, the bartender at a rundown bar is confused when a woman comes in asking to watch the Oscars. However, curiosity gets the best of her as she accepts the request. Her attention suddenly pulled to the stars on screen.

NEWS ANCHOR (Any, 30-40, any ethnicity)

The News anchor is a professional, who is highly skilled as a journalist. With a secondary passion for film and television, they are excited to report on the nominees for the academy awards. However, of all the performances they were especially moved by the performance of one particular actor, Jeremy Leonard.

Please send your information to our email: [methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com](mailto:methodofmadness.shortfilm@gmail.com) and follow us on Instagram @methodofmadness.shortfilm !

Please provide your introduction (who you are, and what role you are interested in), headshots, and demo reel/portfolio to our email and you will shortly get a response for your self tapes to be sent in. Keep in mind that ALL self tapes are DUE by April 08. The callbacks will be on April 15th and April 16th. The filming dates are all day May 20, 21, and 22. Please note that this set will be unpaid however, crafty will be on set. 

We hope to hear from you :)

items.text:
Casting Call for the [https://wssf.com/](https://wssf.com/) 72hr Film Maker Showdown. **Title:**72 film fest submission.

**Format:** Short Film

**Union:** Non-Union

**Location:** Whistler, BC 

**Production:** Created for the Whistler Ski and Snowboard Festival 72-Hour Filmmaker Showdown

**Shoot Dates:** March 27–28, 2026

**Compensation:** Volunteer / Copy & Credit

Transportation from Vancouver will be provided Friday and Saturday if needed.

**Production Note**

This project is being produced as part of a **72-hour film competition** and will be created on an accelerated schedule.

Our goal is to keep the shoot **organized, collaborative, and enjoyable**. While the timeline is tight, this will not be a "run-and-gun chaosproduction". The focus is on having fun, working together creatively, and ensuring everyone walks away with **a strong piece for their reel**, regardless of the competition’s final outcome.

Our team **won this event many years ago**, and we’re excited to return for the **30th anniversary** of the WSSF. 

*This note will be updated as roles are filled.*

⸻

**ROLES**

**DYLAN — LEAD**

Male, **25–55** ( flexible) 

Confident, intense, and charismatic. Dylan carries himself like someone completely certain of his place in the world and speaks with unwavering conviction.Charismatic, stubborn, and relentlessly self-assured.The character should be played with total sincerity — the humour comes from how seriously Dylan takes himself.Actor should be comfortable with subtle physical performance and strong deadpan delivery.

⸻
# **JOSEPH  — SUPPORTING (Role has been Cast)**

Male, **45–70** (flexible)

An eccentric intellectual type with a calm, thoughtful presence. Joseph speaks slowly and deliberately, often with philosophical weight behind his words.Dry, deadpan delivery and strong character instincts preferred.

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit:

• Headshot

• Resume

• Demo reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted with short audition sides for a self-tape. Feel free to reach out via email with any questions.

**Subject Line:**

[ROLE NAME] – [ACTOR NAME]

**Send submissions to:**

72hourfilm2026@gmail.com

**Submission Deadline:**

March 17th

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 –Waffen SS ( szeregowy )**

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów ‘’Grupa1940’’ poszukuje ** mężczyzn** **bez zarostu** w **wieku 20 – 40** lat o wzroście 170 - 180  cm, pas 90/100 i **obwód klatki do 90/105cm**  i do roli żołnierzy szeregowego Waffen SS .Szukamy kogoś z **Gliwic lub okolic**: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej gdyż odległość do tej roli ma znaczenie. Kostium jest  na konkretny wymiar a osoba grająca tego żołnierza będzie zmiennikiem innego o podobnych parametrach jak na zdjęciach. W projekcie **planujemy 6 odcinków** w tym połowa z nich jest z żołnierzami.

Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. Od maja do końca sieprnia  szykujemy się do kilku scen bitewnych z francuzami. Kilka postaci ma nieduże kwestie po niemiecku. **Mundur i wyposażenie jesteśmy w stanie pożyczać.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
Last call for auditions for Darjeeling!
We are still in need of a Josey! Butches and mascs, please give it a go!

Title: Darjeeling

Genre: Romantic drama

Logline: Two ex-roommates with a past full of loose ends reconnect over an imminent tragedy.

Roles (Casting all races and ethnicities. Trans/queer people and people of color encouraged to audition!):

Tate: 24 (casting 18-25), femme lesbian, painter. Distraught at the prospect of a family tragedy, she turns to the only person she knows can help her.

Josey: 23 (casting 18-25), non-binary butch lesbian, muse. It’s been years, Josey knows that—but they’ll be damned if they’re leaving Tate to worry alone tonight.

Extras: We will need extras to mill about an art gallery for the final scene. No restrictions on casting.

Production Team: Parker Watson - Director, Louis White - Producer

Production Type: CU Denver Student Film

Contact Information: DarjeelingShortFilm@gmail.com or @darjeelingfilm on Instagram. Please send any questions there.

Run Time: 7-minute short

Compensation: Unpaid, snacks and meals provided!

Union Status: Non-union

Audition Information: Self-tapes are accepted through March 14 at this link: https://forms.gle/RnKkEq6oPWTgA7v78 

Shooting Schedule: April 2-5. Only 2 shoot days should be needed, so if you have conflicts, please still apply!

Filming Location: CU Denver campus and downtown Denver

Note: This film will be shown at CU Denver's Cinefest in mid-May. All cast and crew are welcome to come and will receive further information as filming progresses.

items.text:
Calling All Screenwriters Development Funding Available for Qualified Screenwriters:

Hello Screenwriters,
If you’re a Screenwriter, whether you're a beginner or an experienced Screenwriter and you're serious about bringing your script to life, we have an opportunity for you.

We are currently working with partners who can help Screenwriters secure development funding to move their project toward pre-production.

To qualify for this opportunity, Screenwriters must have a credit score of 680 or higher.
If you are serious about turning your vision into reality and want to explore funding options, please contact:

Clay Walker
SAG-AFTRA Member
Actor | Producer | Executive Producer
CEO & Founder
Steven Walker Productions
Website: www.swprod.world
Phone: 1-888-643-6933
Email: cwalker@swprod.world
Based in Colorado, USA

Are you serious and meet the criteria to turn your Screenplay into a real, captivating production? If your answer is (YES)
Click the link:
Development Film Funding https://fundinginsidersclub.com/clay
items.previewDescription: Clay started his Acting & Producing career at the University of Nebraske-Lincoln "GBR" later moved to Los Angeles, Ca. While living in Los Angeles, Clay has worked on numerous television shows including: CSI Las Vegas, CSI Miami, Numbers, Scrubs, Criminal Minds and Everybody Hates Chris. He has work...

message.text:
😲💫 Completely blown away by the spinning skills of the Shen Yun dancers — it’s unreal. Meanwhile, I’m over here getting dizzy just watching 😂😅
🎟️ Find your nearest theater and get tickets 👉 https://1kb.link/vG6zC9
⚡️ This isn’t something you can fully feel through a screen — you have to experience the magic, beauty, and energy live.
✨ Trust me, it’s the kind of night you won’t forget.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 12/2026

AND THE OSCAR GOES TO....

Wir präsentieren die Highlights der diesjährigen Verleihung des Academy Awards. 

Abseits des wichtigsten Filmpreises starten äußerst interessante Neuerscheinungen. Erleben Sie Ryan Gosling in DER ASTRONAUT,  den vielleicht besten SciFy Film seit Kubriks 2001 oder das Regiedebüt von Kirsten Stewart (THE CHRONOLOGY OF WATER).

Animationstechnisch präsentieren wir eine ziemlich turbulente Zugfahrt in TIERISCH ABGEFAHREN.

Abgerundet wird die Sendung im Oscarmonat März mit Awardwinnern best Song and best Score der letzten 90 Jahre sowie Songs aus den aktuellen Filmen.

Mittwoch 18.3.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
"Jeg kan ikke tro, at jeg endelig fandt denne opskrift! Min bedstemor lavede dem til julefester, da jeg var lille pige, og jeg sneg mig til så mange som muligt uden at blive opdaget. En sand skyldig fornøjelse, og mit hjerte er så glad for at kunne lave dem igen. Jeg havde bestemt ikke glemt, hvor lækre de var! "
Opskrift i kommentarerne
